assertions.description: For the rev0 (RP2040-based) design, the analyzer correctly identifies W25Q128JVS (128Mbit SPI flash) connected to RP2040 with 6 shared signal nets — matching the full SPI flash pinout: SCK, MOSI/MISO (QSPI data lines), CS, WP (write protect), and HOLD/RESET. The 12MHz crystal oscillator is also correctly identified with 27pF load capacitors (effective CL = 16.5pF). For rev2 (STM32F401 design), the I2C EEPROM M24C64 is correctly detected sharing 2 nets (SCL, SDA) with the MCU.
